name: ENDRA Life Sciences Inc.
business: ENDRA Life Sciences Inc. develops a thermo-acoustic enhanced ultrasound platform (TAEUS) for non-invasive assessment of liver fat, a biomarker for metabolic diseases. It plans to commercialize via a subscription-based model targeting pharmaceutical companies, clinical research organizations, concierge medicine, bariatric clinics, and primary care practices. The company also operates a Digital Asset Treasury initiative investing in decentralized finance assets.
sellsTo: Pharmaceutical Companies and Clinical Research Organizations (CROs)

exposures.sentence: We are developing a next-generation enhanced ultrasound technology platform Thermo- Acoustic Enhanced Ultrasound, or TAEUS .
Our initial focus for the development and commercialization of TAEUS is a solution for the assessment of liver fat, a key biomarker associated with metabolic diseases.
We plan to offer a multi-year, subscription-based business model with recurring revenue, while continuing to support traditional capital equipment sales with associated service and upgrade offerings.
Multiple pharmaceutical companies are actively developing GLP-1 receptor agonists and related therapies, reflecting significant industry investment in metabolic disease treatment.

In 2025, the Company expanded its business strategy to include a Digital Asset Treasury ( DAT ) initiative, managed in collaboration with Arca Investment Management ( Arca ), which seeks to optimize capital preservation and generate non-dilutive returns through investments in decentralized finance ( DeFi ) assets.

catalysts.event: Board initiated process to evaluate strategic alternatives
catalysts.sentence: On March 25, 2026, the Company announced that its Board of Directors initiated a process to evaluate a range of strategic alternatives aimed at maximizing shareholder value.

tamClaims.claim: Over two billion people worldwide are affected by steatotic liver disease, including more than 100 million in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: Rising SLD with No Reliable, Inexpensive, Point-of-Care Test SLD is a rapidly emerging global health crisis, affecting over two billion people worldwide, including more than 100 million individuals in the United States.
